page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7se.16xlarge is a compute-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture. It features 64 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor operating at a base frequency of 2.9 GHz. With a single thread per core configuration, the instance provides dedicated, non-shared CPU resources managed via the KVM hypervisor.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. This 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio aligns with compute-intensive design patterns. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external block storage for operating systems and persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

The lack of local storage and GPU acceleration represents a clear tradeoff, positioning this instance away from heavy graphics processing or high-speed local caching workloads. However, the high density of dedicated physical cores makes it highly efficient for CPU-bound tasks. Suitable workloads include high-performance computing, batch processing, intensive web serving, and distributed analytics where raw compute power is prioritized over large memory footprints or local disk speed.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7se.16xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance featuring 64 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor with a single thread per core, it delivers dedicated CPU allocation for predictable performance. The instance is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, establishing a 1:2 vCPU-to-memory ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not contain local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. This resource profile makes the instance highly cost-efficient for compute-heavy workloads that do not require local disk caching or graphics acceleration. It is well-suited for batch processing, high-performance computing, and distributed compute tasks.

tagline: A dedicated compute-optimized instance featuring sixty-four physical Intel Xeon cores and a balanced two gigabytes of memory per core.
